---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the problem or gap this feature addresses. What are you trying to diagnose that SpaceJamf can't help with today?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see. Include example CLI invocations if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds or other tools have you tried?

## Privacy / security considerations

Does this feature involve collecting new types of data? If so, what data and how should it be scrubbed before being sent to Claude?

## Additional context

Screenshots, log samples (redacted), links, or any other context.
